property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\HP\OMEN-Broadcast\Common;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\qasar\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;.

testcase.name: TC01 - Verify user can login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: @ECommerceAPI @Regression @Login @TC01 Scenario: TC01 - Verify user can login with valid credentials # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:14 ✔ Given I have a valid login request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_login_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "LoginAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then ecommerce "loginResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "token" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_a_valid(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "userId" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_a_valid(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.login.response.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC02 - Verify user can add a product with valid payload
testcase.system-out: @ECommerceAPI @Regression @AddProduct @TC02 Scenario: TC02 - Verify user can add a product with valid payload # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:26 Running login before: TC02 - Verify user can add a product with valid payload ✔ Given I have a valid add product request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_product_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then ecommerce "addProductResponse" response status code should be 201 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain a valid "productId" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_a_valid(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.addProduct.response.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC03 - Verify product is persisted correctly after adding
testcase.system-out: @ECommerceAPI @Regression @GetProduct @TC03 Scenario: TC03 - Verify product is persisted correctly after adding # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:38 Running login before: TC03 - Verify product is persisted correctly after adding ✔ Given I have a valid add product request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_product_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid get product detail request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_get_product_detail_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetProductDetailAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.getProductDetail.response.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC04 - Verify user can add product to cart
testcase.system-out: @ECommerceAPI @Regression @AddToCart @TC04 Scenario: TC04 - Verify user can add product to cart # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:51 Running login before: TC04 - Verify user can add product to cart ✔ Given I have a valid add product request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_product_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid get product detail request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_get_product_detail_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetProductDetailAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And I store the "data.productImage" from the "getProductDetailResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid add to cart request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_to_cart_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddToCartAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then ecommerce "addToCartResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And ecommerce "addToCartResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.addToCart.response.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC05 - Verify user can create an order successfully
testcase.system-out: @ECommerceAPI @Regression @CreateOrder @TC05 Scenario: TC05 - Verify user can create an order successfully # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:68 Running login before: TC05 - Verify user can create an order successfully ✔ Given I have a valid add product request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_product_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid create order request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_create_order_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "CreateOrderAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response status code should be 201 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain a valid "orders" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_a_valid(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.create.order.response" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "productOrderId[0]" as "productId" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC06 - Verify order is persisted correctly after creation
testcase.system-out: @ECommerceAPI @Regression @GetOrder @TC06 Scenario: TC06 - Verify order is persisted correctly after creation # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:83 Running login before: TC06 - Verify order is persisted correctly after creation ✔ Given I have a valid add product request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_product_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid create order request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_create_order_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "CreateOrderAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response status code should be 201 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And I store the "orders[0]" from the "createOrderResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid get order request # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_get_order_request() ✔ When I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetOrderAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then ecommerce "getOrderResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And ecommerce "getOrderResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.get.order.response.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC07 - Verify user can delete an existing order
testcase.system-out: @ECommerceAPI @Regression @DeleteOrder @TC07 Scenario: TC07 - Verify user can delete an existing order # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:100 Running login before: TC07 - Verify user can delete an existing order ✔ Given I have a valid add product request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_product_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid create order request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_create_order_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "CreateOrderAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response status code should be 201 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And I store the "orders[0]" from the "createOrderResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid delete order request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_delete_order_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "DELETE" request to endpoint with "DeleteOrderAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then ecommerce "deleteOrderResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And ecommerce "deleteOrderResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.delete.order.response.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC08 - Verify user can delete an existing product
testcase.system-out: @ECommerceAPI @Regression @DeleteProduct @TC08 Scenario: TC08 - Verify user can delete an existing product # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:117 Running login before: TC08 - Verify user can delete an existing product ✔ Given I have a valid add product request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_product_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid delete product request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_delete_product_request_payload() ✔ When I send a "DELETE" request to endpoint with "DeleteProductAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then ecommerce "deleteProductResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And ecommerce "deleteProductResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.delete.product.resposne.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)
